html:
2026-0555
2026-06-04IRCC, TBFinancial Administration ActRemission Order for Certain Fees Under the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations (March 31, 2026 to April 29, 2026)Remission Order for Certain Fees Under the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations (March 31, 2026 to April 29, 2026) in order to remit the difference between the new fees and the old fees, for applications received between March 31, 2026 and April 29, 2026, inclusive, from those who applied by mail using an old form for one or more services, and who paid the old fees despite being required to pay the new fees.N/A
subject: Remission Order for Certain Fees Under the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations (March 31, 2026 to April 29, 2026)
precis: Remission Order for Certain Fees Under the Passport and Other Travel Document Services Fees Regulations (March 31, 2026 to April 29, 2026) in order to remit the difference between the new fees and the old fees, for applications received between March 31, 2026 and April 29, 2026, inclusive, from those who applied by mail using an old form for one or more services, and who paid the old fees despite being required to pay the new fees.
